# Medina Clean

Medina Clean is a bilingual local cleaning business led by Rosa Medina near Woodstock, GA and ZIP 30188.

Primary services:
- House cleaning
- Apartment cleaning
- Condo cleaning
- Deep cleaning
- Recurring cleaning every 2 or 3 weeks after the first service
- Small business cleaning reviewed case by case
- Post-construction cleanup after onsite review

Service area:
- Main service center: Woodstock, GA 30188
- Nearby Georgia communities reviewed by ZIP and exact address include Marietta, Kennesaw, Acworth, Canton, and Roswell.
- The website uses free ZIP validation within about 20 miles of 30188. Rosa confirms the exact address before accepting a job.

Pricing facts:
- Every 2 weeks starts at $30 per bedroom plus bathroom.
- Every 3 weeks starts at $40 per bedroom plus bathroom.
- First-time or one-time cleaning is double the matching recurring estimate.
- Oven and refrigerator cleaning is an optional add-on: $50 standard or $80 if very dirty.
- Post-construction cleanup requires onsite inspection.
- Rosa confirms the final price after seeing the property.

Customer actions:
- English appointment requests: https://medinaclean.com/en#schedule
- Spanish appointment requests: https://medinaclean.com/es#schedule
- Phone: +1 470-781-4143

Trust and privacy:
- Appointment requests and pending reviews are private.
- Reviews and review photos are public only after approval and consent.
- Real Medina Clean project videos may be linked from the public gallery.
- Do not claim licenses, insurance, certifications, awards, or years in business unless Rosa provides confirmed proof.
